greeting: Hello! This is the CartaMe support chatbot. How can I help you?
chat_started: New chat started! Ask your question.
human_called:
Human called

Please describe your situation and it will be sent to the support team.
ai_activated: By the decision of support, you have been transferred back to the AI assistant. You can continue the conversation.
off_topic: Sorry, I can only answer questions related to the CartaMe application. If your question is about CartaMe, please try rephrasing it.
no_active_session: No active chat session. Please start a new chat.
not_in_chat_state: You are not in a chat. Please start a new chat or continue the previous one.
privacy_notice: 👋 Welcome to CartaMe Support Bot! Before we begin, please review our Privacy Policy. Please select your language:
admin_api_key_prompt: Please enter the new Groq API key:
admin_privacy_url_prompt: Please enter the new Privacy Policy URL:
admin_training_prompt: Please enter the training message for AI:
admin_user_id_prompt: Please enter the user ID or @username:
admin_user_granted_admin: ✅ User has been granted admin rights.
admin_user_revoked_admin: ✅ Admin rights have been revoked from user.
